summary: The actual screenshot shows a connecting screen with a centered uplink panel on a starfield background, matching some global style requirements but differing significantly in text content, layout, and additional elements compared to the wireframe. The wireframe appears to incorrectly render the prompt description text instead of visualizing the intended UI, making it unsuitable for validation.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: Dark starfield/game-map background
correctElements.evidence: Both images feature a dark starfield background with scattered stars and cosmic elements.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: thin green panel borders
correctElements.evidence: The centered panel in both has thin green borders.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: semi-transparent black panels
correctElements.evidence: The main panel appears semi-transparent black in both, allowing the starfield to show through.

correctElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: terminal-style labels
correctElements.evidence: Text in both uses a green, monospace-like font consistent with terminal style.

incorrectElements.requirement: FR-UI-SCREEN-MAIN-MENU-CONNECTING: The Main menu connecting screen must visually satisfy the documented screen description
incorrectElements.expected: No top title like 'RiskyStars Fleet command interface'
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe has 'RiskyStars Fleet command interface' at the top, absent in actual
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra title in wireframe not present in actual screenshot or screen description, indicating mismatch in layout.

incorrectElements.requirement: Screen description: The panel contains Establishing Uplink and a progress/status line
incorrectElements.expected: 'Establishing Uplink', 'Preparing the next command surface', 'Connecting to the sector network...', 'The multiplayer lobby browser will appear when the uplink is ready.'
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe shows prompt description text like 'Connecting state. Same framed command deck...' instead of intended UI text
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe renders the prompt text literally rather than visualizing the described UI elements, leading to incorrect content validation.

incorrectElements.expected: No buttons in connecting state per description
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe includes 'PRIMARY ACTION' and 'BACK' buttons at bottom, absent in actual
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Extra controls in wireframe not matching the connecting state description, which implies a passive progress display.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: fixed screen-relative geometry
incorrectElements.expected: Large centered panel spanning most of the screen height
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe has a smaller centered panel with buttons below, while actual has a wider, taller panel without buttons
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Differences in panel bounds and nesting affect layout validation.

incorrectElements.expected: Dynamic status text with ellipsis indicating ongoing process
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe shows static prompt text, no actual progress indicator
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe does not represent the dynamic nature of the status, limiting validation of behavioral requirements.

incorrectElements.requirement: Global wireframe style requirements: The output is a precise layout baseline, not a Mermaid flowchart
incorrectElements.expected: No extraneous labels like 'Prompt baseline: Main menu connecting'
incorrectElements.actual: Wireframe has bottom label 'Prompt baseline: Main menu connecting', absent in actual
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Wireframe includes meta-information not part of the UI, which pollutes the baseline for comparison.

incorrectElements.requirement: TR-UI-AUDIT-HWND-001: The actual screenshot must be captured from the RiskyStars client HWND at 1536x832
incorrectElements.expected: Exact pixel match possible with wireframe
incorrectElements.actual: Slight variations in starfield rendering and anti-aliasing may occur due to runtime generation
incorrectElements.whyIncorrect: Even in close matches, dynamic backgrounds introduce residual validation risks without pixel-perfect comparison tools.

wireframeSuitability.why: The wireframe incorrectly renders the prompt description text as UI content instead of visualizing the intended connecting screen elements, making it ineffective for validating the functional and technical requirements. It includes extraneous elements like titles, buttons, and meta-labels not in the screen description.
missingRequirements: Dynamic progress indication (e.g., animation or updating status)
Behavioral aspects like button enablement during connecting state
recommendedWireframeChanges: Regenerate wireframe to accurately depict the described UI with correct text and no prompt literals
Remove extra titles, buttons, and meta-labels to match screen description
Include placeholders for dynamic elements like progress bars or spinners
